title: System Monitor
liveStatsUnavailable: GPU detected via system enumeration. Live VRAM stats are unavailable for this card — the chosen llama.cpp backend did not return a device list, but the GPU is still usable for inference.
noActiveGpus: No active GPUs. All GPUs are currently disabled.

driverOutdated.title: NVIDIA driver too old for GPU acceleration
driverOutdated.description: Detected {{gpu}} with driver {{driver}}. Atomic Chat requires driver {{minDriver}}+ for CUDA acceleration; until you update, models will run on CPU.
